name: Application Window Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of visible application windows for target identification
query:
// Detect application window enumeration
// Trigger on tasklist with window title or xdotool
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(tasklist.*\/v|Get-Process.*MainWindowTitle|xdotool.*search.*--name|wmctrl\s+-l)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
